4047.issue: [S4047] Adapter "cmicoe" is not yet available in the stable repository. Please consider adding it.

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/FreDeko06/ioBroker.cmicoe/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/FreDeko06/ioBroker.cmicoe/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/FreDeko06/ioBroker.cmicoe/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
